TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Calavi ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 81 buwan, 217 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 96%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Calavi hya' ga Padrangigrang. tay mkyahu' na Calavi hya' ga Tjatjigel. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Calavi ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨala*i ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨala*i ħjaʔ ɣa pa*raŋiɣraŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨala*i ħjaʔ ɣa tjatjiɣel. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨala*i ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Calavi ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 81 buwan, 217 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 96%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Calavi hya' ga Padrangigrang. tay mkyahu' na Calavi hya' ga Tjatjigel. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Calavi ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨala*i ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨala*i ħjaʔ ɣa pa*raŋiɣraŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨala*i ħjaʔ ɣa tjatjiɣel. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨala*i ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
